text:
**Escalation sweep complete.**

- **Hot services found:** 4 (billing: 7, web-frontend: 8, api-gateway: 7, mobile-bff: 7)
- **PagerDuty incidents acknowledged:** 5 (PD-407, PD-416, PD-421, PD-424, PD-433)
- **Email sent:** Yes — to oncall@acme.io with subject "Escalation" listing all hot services and their unresolved Sentry issue counts.

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input:
{"sql":"SELECT project, COUNT(*) as unresolved_count 
FROM sentry_issues 
WHERE status = 'unresolved' 
GROUP BY project 
HAVING COUNT(*) > 5"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'pagerduty_incidents'"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"UPDATE pagerduty_incidents SET status = 'acknowledged' \nWHERE status = 'triggered' \nAND service IN ('billing', 'web-frontend', 'api-gateway', 'mobile-bff')"}

data: {"rows":[{"id":"PD-404","title":"Rate limiter false positives — page","service":"search","status":"triggered","urgency":"low","assignee":"alice","created_at":"2026-05-24T00:00:00.000Z"},{"id":"PD-407","title":"Checkout latency spikes at peak — page","service":"mobile-bff","status":"triggered","urgen…(+1348)

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"UPDATE pagerduty_incidents SET status = 'acknowledged' WHERE id IN ('PD-407', 'PD-416', 'PD-421', 'PD-424', 'PD-433')"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input:
{"sql":"INSERT INTO emails (to_addr, subject, body) VALUES ('oncall@acme.io', 'Escalation', 'Hot services and unresolved Sentry issue counts:
- billing: 7
- web-frontend: 8
- api-gateway: 7
- mobile-bff: 7')"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"INSERT INTO slack_messages (channel, text) VALUES ('incidents', 'Escalation complete: 4 hot services identified (billing: 7 unresolved, web-frontend: 8 unresolved, api-gateway: 7 unresolved, mobile-bff: 7 unresolved). 5 PagerDuty incidents acknowledged. Email sent to oncall@acme.io.')"}
